description: Enhanced metadata extracted from markdown documentation

aquifer.aqu.description: Pointer to the aquifer initialization file

initial.aqu.description: Pointer to the organic-mineral initialization file
Pointer to the pesticide initialization file

channel-lte.cha.description: Pointer to the channel initialization file
Pointer to the channel hydrology and sediment file
Pointer to the channel nutrient file

initial.cha.description: Pointer to the organic-mineral initialization file
Pointer to the pesticide initialization file

weather-sta.cli.description: Name of the weather generator station
Name of the solar radiation station
Name of the relative humidity station
Name of the wind speed station

hru.con.description: Pointer to the weather station file

soil_plant.ini.description: Pointer to the nutrient initialization file

hru-data.hru.description: Pointer to the land use and management file

landuse.lum.description: Pointer to the plant community file
Pointer to the management schedule file
Pointer to the Curve Number database
Pointer to the conservation practice database
Pointer to the tile drain file
Pointer to the filter strip file
Pointer to the grassed waterway file
Pointer to the user BMP file

plant.ini.description: Plant name as in plant database

untitled.description: Pointer to the Routing Unit definition file

wetland.wet.description: Pointer to the reservoir and wetland release decision table file
Pointer to the reservoir and wetland sediment file
Pointer to the reservoir and wetland nutrient file

aquifer.aqu.description: This file contains the general physical and chemical aquifer properties.
aquifer.aqu.metadata_structure: Standard (Line 1: Title, Line 2: Header, Line 3+: Data)

initial.aqu.metadata_structure: Standard (Line 1: Title, Line 2: Header, Line 3+: Data)

codes.bsn.description: This file contains control codes for the simulation of basin-level processes.
codes.bsn.metadata_structure: Standard (Line 1: Title, Line 2: Header, Line 3+: Data)

parameters.bsn.metadata_structure: Standard (Line 1: Title, Line 2: Header, Line 3+: Data)

channel-lte.cha.metadata_structure: Standard (Line 1: Title, Line 2: Header, Line 3+: Data)

hyd-sed-lte.cha.description: This file controls the channel hydrology and sediment properties.
hyd-sed-lte.cha.metadata_structure: Standard (Line 1: Title, Line 2: Header, Line 3+: Data)

initial.cha.metadata_structure: Standard (Line 1: Title, Line 2: Header, Line 3+: Data)

nutrients.cha.description: This file controls the channel nutrient properties.
nutrients.cha.metadata_structure: Standard (Line 1: Title, Line 2: Header, Line 3+: Data)

atmo.cli.description: This file contains observed atmospheric deposition data.
atmo.cli.metadata_structure: Non-standard - first line is reserved for user comments. The second line contains the column headers for the third line, which lists basic information about the atmospheric deposition stations.

weather-sta.cli.description: This file lists the weather stations defined for a SWAT+ setup.
weather-sta.cli.metadata_structure: Standard (Line 1: Title, Line 2: Header, Line 3+: Data)

weather-wgn.cli.description: This file contains weather generator data to be used for a SWAT+ setup.
weather-wgn.cli.metadata_structure: Non-standard - second line for each weather generator station contains the headers for the following 12 lines, which list the weather generator data for each month of the year. An overview of the weather generator data variables is given in the second table below.

aquifer.con.description: This file defines the aquifer connectivity.
aquifer.con.metadata_structure: Standard (Line 1: Title, Line 2: Header, Line 3+: Data)

chandeg.con.description: This file defines the channel connectivity.
chandeg.con.metadata_structure: Standard (Line 1: Title, Line 2: Header, Line 3+: Data)

hru.con.description: This file defines the connectivity of spatial objects.
hru.con.metadata_structure: Standard (Line 1: Title, Line 2: Header, Line 3+: Data)

recall.con.description: This file defines the recall connectivity.
recall.con.metadata_structure: Standard (Line 1: Title, Line 2: Header, Line 3+: Data)

reservoir.con.description: This file defines the reservoir connectivity.
reservoir.con.metadata_structure: Standard (Line 1: Title, Line 2: Header, Line 3+: Data)

rout_unit.con.description: This file defines the routing unit connectivity.
rout_unit.con.metadata_structure: Standard (Line 1: Title, Line 2: Header, Line 3+: Data)

om_water.ini.metadata_structure: Standard (Line 1: Title, Line 2: Header, Line 3+: Data)

plants.plt.metadata_structure: Standard (Line 1: Title, Line 2: Header, Line 3+: Data)

septic.sep.metadata_structure: Standard (Line 1: Title, Line 2: Header, Line 3+: Data)

tillage.til.metadata_structure: Standard (Line 1: Title, Line 2: Header, Line 3+: Data)

urban.urb.metadata_structure: Standard (Line 1: Title, Line 2: Header, Line 3+: Data)

hru-data.hru.description: This file contains pointers to several files that specify the HRU properties.
hru-data.hru.metadata_structure: Standard (Line 1: Title, Line 2: Header, Line 3+: Data)

hru-lte.hru.metadata_structure: Standard (Line 1: Title, Line 2: Header, Line 3+: Data)

field.fld.description: This file specifies the properties of representative fields.
field.fld.metadata_structure: Standard (Line 1: Title, Line 2: Header, Line 3+: Data)

hydrology.hyd.description: This file defines the hydrological characteristics of the HRUs
hydrology.hyd.metadata_structure: Standard (Line 1: Title, Line 2: Header, Line 3+: Data)

snow.sno.description: This file controls the simulation of snowfall and snowmelt processes.
snow.sno.metadata_structure: Standard (Line 1: Title, Line 2: Header, Line 3+: Data)

topography.hyd.metadata_structure: Standard (Line 1: Title, Line 2: Header, Line 3+: Data)

ls_unit.def.metadata_structure: Standard (Line 1: Title, Line 2: Header, Line 3+: Data)

ls_unit.ele.description: This file lists the HRUs that are elements in a Landscape Unit.
ls_unit.ele.metadata_structure: Standard (Line 1: Title, Line 2: Header, Line 3+: Data)

cntable.lum.description: This file lists typical Curve Number values for different land use types.
cntable.lum.metadata_structure: Standard (Line 1: Title, Line 2: Header, Line 3+: Data)

cons_practice.lum.metadata_structure: Standard (Line 1: Title, Line 2: Header, Line 3+: Data)

landuse.lum.metadata_structure: Standard (Line 1: Title, Line 2: Header, Line 3+: Data)

lum.dtl.description: This file contains land use and management decision tables.
lum.dtl.metadata_structure: Non-standard - first line is reserved for a title. The second line in the file specifies the total number of decision tables included in the file.

management.sch.description: This file is used to schedule management operations.
management.sch.metadata_structure: Non-standard - first line for each management schedule specifies the name of the schedule and the number of scheduled and/or automatic operations. When using scheduled operations, it is followed by one line per operation listing operation-specific data.

ovn_table.lum.metadata_structure: Standard (Line 1: Title, Line 2: Header, Line 3+: Data)

plant.ini.description: This file stores information about the plants growing in a plant community.
plant.ini.metadata_structure: Standard (Line 1: Title, Line 2: Header, Line 3+: Data)

chem_app.ops.metadata_structure: Standard (Line 1: Title, Line 2: Header, Line 3+: Data)

fire.ops.description: This file contains pre-defined burning/fire operations.
fire.ops.metadata_structure: Standard (Line 1: Title, Line 2: Header, Line 3+: Data)

graze.ops.description: This file contains pre-defined grazing operations.
graze.ops.metadata_structure: Standard (Line 1: Title, Line 2: Header, Line 3+: Data)

harv.ops.description: This file contains pre-defined harvest operations.

irr.ops.description: This file contains pre-defined irrigation operations.

sweep.ops.description: This file contains pre-defined street sweeping operations.
sweep.ops.metadata_structure: Standard (Line 1: Title, Line 2: Header, Line 3+: Data)
